description: Start and end timestamps for all wells in a selected merged fleet/pad.
sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(fleet_name, ''), 'Unknown') AS fleet_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(pad_name, ''), 'Unknown') AS pad_name, MIN(first_record_ts) AS start_time, MAX(last_record_ts) AS end_time FROM featurestore:merged_well_index_v1 WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(fleet_name, ''), 'Unknown') = :fleet_name AND COALESCE(NULLIF(pad_name, ''), 'Unknown') = :pad_name GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(fleet_name, ''), 'Unknown'), COALESCE(NULLIF(pad_name, ''), 'Unknown')) q
